instruction: The building office icon's lines look thin. Fix the stroke-width back to the default 1.5.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/building-office.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="0.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 21h16.5M4.5 3h15M5.25 3v18m13.5-18v18M9 6.75h1.5m-1.5 3h1.5m-1.5 3h1.5m3-6H15m-1.5 3H15m-1.5 3H15M9 21v-3.375c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h3.75c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125V21"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/building-office.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 21h16.5M4.5 3h15M5.25 3v18m13.5-18v18M9 6.75h1.5m-1.5 3h1.5m-1.5 3h1.5m3-6H15m-1.5 3H15m-1.5 3H15M9 21v-3.375c0-.621.504-1.125 1.125-1.125h3.75c.621 0 1.125.504 1.125 1.125V21"/></g>
</svg>
